name: Demon Alive
short_description: Enter the ancient forest ruled by cursed demons. Your mission: Find the hidden chalices. But beware – the demons use these chalices to teleport you to eerie, dangerous places!
detailed_description:
SINGLEPLAYER MODE:

Dive into the dark wilderness of an ancient forest and face the hidden demons who put you to the test. Your mission is clear: collect the secret chalices that the demons have hidden deep within this living, breathing forest. But beware, this forest is no ordinary place. The demons reign here, and they are cursed. They possess the ability to teleport you to other places – and they use the chalices to do so!

The Goal is Clear: Find All the Chalices!

But the journey won't be easy. First, you must face the dark domains—sinister places where darkness itself seems alive. Here, horror lurks in every shadow, and only with unwavering patience can you endure the trials set by the demons.

These creatures of the night will do everything in their power to stop you. But know this: if you remain steadfast and survive their assaults, their resistance will falter. Only then, in a moment of reluctant surrender, will they reveal the hidden chalices—unintentionally paving your way to victory.

You have two essential tools at your disposal: a trusty pistol to protect yourself and a flashlight to pierce the ever-present darkness. Use them wisely, for the shadows are deceptive, and the demons are merciless.

If you prove both your strength and your patience, the chalices will ultimately belong to you—trophies of your unwavering courage and determination.

Now I ask you: Are you ready to face the games of the demons and claim the chalices for yourself?

MULTIPLAYER MODE:

Shadow Hunt – Curse of the Chalice

Dive into a chilling co-op horror adventure for 1-4 players. Find all keys to free the cursed chalice while facing a new demon with unique, deadly abilities each round. Use your flashlight to pierce the darkness—but beware, light attracts some creatures. Hide, stay silent, and work together to escape. Will you break the curse or become its next victim?

Features:

  • Dynamic demons with distinct abilities

  • Co-op gameplay for up to 4 players

  • Atmospheric, dark environments

  • Strategic hiding and resource management

Demon Flood: Aksa's Last Stand:

Stand against relentless demon waves in this intense co-op shooter for 1-4 players, defending the city of Aksa. Choose from a deadly arsenal—pistols to shotguns—and battle increasingly brutal hordes. Each wave ramps up the challenge, culminating in a showdown with the Hell Lord. Teamwork is key to survival. Will you save Aksa or fall to the abyss?

Features:

  • Co-op action for up to 4 players

  • Diverse weapon arsenal

  • Escalating demon waves with an epic boss fight

  • Emphasis on teamwork and tactical gameplay

supported_languages:
English, French, Italian, German, Arabic, Simplified Chinese, Indonesian, Japanese, Korean, Polish, Russian, Turkish*, Ukrainian, Spanish - Spain
*languages with full audio support
